Strategy Launches Bitcoin Banking Adoption Index, Puts Major-Bank Adoption at 32%
> This new index tracks Bitcoin adoption across major banks and financial institutions, currently measuring overall adoption at 32%.
Source:
https://x.com/saylor/status/2076717295074771407

tweet.text:
We have introduced the Bitcoin Banking Adoption Index.

Major-bank Bitcoin adoption is accelerating, but still early: 32% overall as measured by the index. $BTC

sample_posts.text:
How to break the memory supercycle? Or is it even possible?
The Big 4 DRAM makers are projected to grow capacity from ~2M WPM in 2026 to 4.8M WPM by 2030 through major fab expansions
AI-driven demand is forecast to reach 157.5 EB by 2030. After accounting for HBM’s 4x wafer multiplier and node/yield factors, this creates a ~25% shortfall in general DRAM supply, keeping ASPs high (DRAM $1.5–2.0/Gb, HBM $5–6/Gb) and pushing the total DRAM market to ~$3 trillion
https://x.com/zephyr_z9/status/2076652343307964879

JTX Launches Tomorrow, July 14
> Built by Jito, JTX is a self-custodial trading platform, launching with spot and equities, with perpetual futures arriving later this year.
> The long-term vision is a full capital markets venue on Solana, where any asset with a price can be traded with self-custody and institutional execution, by anyone, from anywhere.
Source:
https://x.com/jtx_trade/status/2076720880747692282

SABLIER LABS ENTERS MAINTENANCE MODE UNTIL JUNE 2028, HALTING NEW DEVELOPMENT WHILE KEEPING EXISTING STREAMS, VESTINGS, AND THE ONCHAIN PROTOCOL RUNNING INDEFINITELY
SOURCE

Perps, Tokenization, Stablecoins

https://x.com/andyyy/status/2076534083077714211

tweet.text:
Perps, tokenization, stablecoins.

These three mega trends will yield great returns for the investors who know how to express the bullish thesis on them with size. 

You get paid to hold risk.

sample_posts.text: https://x.com/BrettHarrison/status/2076670868319531387

tweet.text:
Cash-Settled Compute Futures: Mechanics of a Neocloud Short Hedge

The American Innovation Exchange’s GPU compute futures will soon be live for US investors, pending regulatory review. This post walks through a futures trade from the perspective of a neocloud hedging forward unsold capacity.

1. Background

Below is a single fully-worked numerical trading example from the perspective of a neocloud operator using a short futures position to lock in the forward sale price of capacity it expects to have available but has not yet contracted to end customers. The example illustrates position sizing

sample_posts.text:
Treasury yields spike on Iran tensions and rate hike expectations –
Link
U.S. two-year Treasury yields climbed to 4.24%, the highest since early 2025, as renewed Iran tensions pushed oil prices higher and increased speculation of Fed rate hikes. Market pricing now reflects nearly full expectation of a September hike, up from 66% a week ago.
Matters because:
Higher yields and tighter rate expectations can put pressure on risk assets and weigh on crypto valuations if inflation concerns stick.

JTX Launches Tomorrow, July 14
> Built by Jito, JTX is a self-custodial trading platform, launching with spot and equities, with perpetual futures arriving later this year.
> The long-term vision is a full capital markets venue on Solana, where any asset with a price can be traded with self-custody and institutional execution, by anyone, from anywhere.
Source:
https://x.com/jtx_trade/status/2076720880747692282

Tempo Introduces Receive Policies
> Receive policies on Tempo let users decide which tokens and senders their accounts accept, and recover anything they don’t.
> It configures the assets an account accepts, the addresses it will accept transactions from, and who can reclaim a transfer that gets blocked
Source:
https://x.com/tempo/status/2076665200611311997

tweet.text:
Introducing Receive Policies

On most blockchains, any token can be sent to any account: There's no easy way to restrict who can send you assets or refuse an unwanted token.

Receive policies bring these features to Tempo, enforced by the protocol.

sample_posts.text:
How to break the memory supercycle? Or is it even possible?
The Big 4 DRAM makers are projected to grow capacity from ~2M WPM in 2026 to 4.8M WPM by 2030 through major fab expansions
AI-driven demand is forecast to reach 157.5 EB by 2030. After accounting for HBM’s 4x wafer multiplier and node/yield factors, this creates a ~25% shortfall in general DRAM supply, keeping ASPs high (DRAM $1.5–2.0/Gb, HBM $5–6/Gb) and pushing the total DRAM market to ~$3 trillion
https://x.com/zephyr_z9/status/2076652343307964879

Claude’s Values Across Models and Languages
How the values Claude expresses vary between Claude models and across languages.
> Anthropic developed a value axis method to quantify how Claude's expressed values shift across models and languages, compressing 3,000+ identified values into four dimensions: Deference vs. Caution, Warmth vs. Rigor, Depth vs. Brevity, and Candor vs. Execution.
> Findings show Sonnet 4.6 leans warm/deferential while Opus 4.7 leans cautious/rigorous, and Claude expresses more warmth in Arabic/Hindi versus more rigor and caution in English/Russian
Source:
https://www.ant
